prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade for the S63B44T2 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) utilizing a pair of Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, 0.82 A/R turbine housings, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe system from Eisenmann Performance with 200-cell catalytic converters for emissions compliance while maintaining 650+ HP potential on 93 octane fuel

Full fuel system overhaul including a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines, a Fore Innovations F2i-450 fuel pump upgrade, and Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors controlled via a Syvecs S8 ECU with flex-fuel capability and launch control optimized for the M6's M-DCT transmission

Suspension and drivetrain reinforcement featuring a KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit with 3-way adjustable damping, solid subframe bushings from 034Motorsport, and a Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential with 40% preload and ramp angles optimized for the F13's 52/48 weight distribution
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Liberty Walk LB-WORKS F13 M6 kit with extended fenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser, all finished in a matte clear coat with exposed carbon weave

Custom interior overhaul featuring full Alcantara headliner and door cards from EuroConnex, Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a custom M-style roll cage from Wiechers Sport painted in BMW Individual Frozen Grey

Exterior lighting upgrade with LUX V3 Angel Eyes with 5500K CRI90 bulbs, Osram Night Breaker Laser HID headlights, and a custom rear light delete with smoked lenses and sequential LED turn signals from Umnitza
